{{Infobox group
| name = Independent Guilds
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

''See also: [[Independent Guilds Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Independent [[Guilds]] are a collection of organizations that serve as essential pillars for the [[Aurelian Empire]], though they operate separately from the Imperialist factions. This group is composed of the [[Alchemists]], [[Consultants]], [[Greenwardens]], and the [[Luminian Order]]. While they provide critical support services that allow other organizations to function, they possess a significant economic base that rivals the military power of the [[Imperialists]]. The [[Consultants]] are noted for their extreme efficiency and reliability, though they are sometimes described as producing interchangeable members who follow orders with mechanical precision. The [[Greenwardens]] are visually distinct, often appearing wrapped in living vines. The role of these guilds is multifaceted; for example, the [[Luminian Order]] provides overt security while the [[Consultants]] offer protection from the shadows. Some guilds also maintain unofficial roles, such as employing assassins or managing executions through specific internal roles like the [[Gardeners]]. Despite their importance, the [[Independents]] face internal friction due to a lack of cooperation between individual guilds and have faced criticism for being ineffective or predatory toward common citizens. The stability of the [[Empire]] is closely tied to these groups, as their continued cooperation or potential dissolution directly impacts the survival of the imperial structure.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The capacity of the [[Independent Guilds]] to organize depends on the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Witnesses]] might support an alliance against the [[Independent Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independent Guilds]] are gathered outside the main door of the [[Rose Tower]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] expressed a desire for the Independent [[Guilds]] to voluntarily adopt a single, unified voice. Despite this goal, the guilds remained unpopular within the heart of the [[Empire]] and were tasked with the heavy responsibility of managing mutual defense and unification efforts. By a certain point, the guilds had already begun to retreat. Their involvement in political violence was later confirmed when they killed [[Baldezar Kern]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] want the [[Independent Guilds]] to speak with one voice voluntarily.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Independent Guilds]] are not loved in the heart of the [[Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The burden of making unification or mutual defense efforts falls on the [[Independent Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Independent Guilds]] have already retreated.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Independent Guilds]] killed [[Baldezar Kern]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
